bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteBundle for the prism and attach a prism-split behavior component consumed by the light routing system.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_prism_glass_static_48x48.png through AssetServer and reuse one static texture for all prism placements.
runtime_notes: The prism should look visually centered so three-way split angles feel fair when the player repositions it.
Keep inner facets bright enough to distinguish prism behavior from the plane mirror.
Do not imply rotation handles because the GDD specifies that prisms are not rotatable.

context.usage: Moveable prism that splits one incoming beam into three outgoing directions to drive multi-target light puzzles.

shape.silhouette: Chunky square prism block with beveled gold edges, bright internal facets, and a slight triangular highlight pattern.

acceptance_criteria: Facet structure is readable enough to distinguish the prism from the mirror at gameplay scale.
The silhouette stays symmetric so beam-split behavior feels centered and predictable.

reference_images.purpose: Grounds the twilight art-deco tower mood, silhouette layering, amber beam contrast, and architectural ornament rhythm.
